title: Honey · Jelly · Propolis Classification
description: The 4-tier Hive classification applied to any Tribunal-graded output. Maps directly to CRE Class A/B/C asset grading. Royal Jelly is the apex (≥0.85 or 95+). Honey is production-safe (≥0.70). Jelly is repair-candidate. Propolis is trust-break.

classification.description: The tier assigned to this output

score.description: Numeric score that resolved to the classification (0-100 scale)

score_thresholds.description: The threshold band each class sits in · stored on the record for audit

evidence_count.description: Number of independent evidence sources backing the output · feeds the rule layer

failure_modes_detected.description: Which of the 7 SwarmFixer failure modes were observed

class_a_b_c_mapping.description: Mirror to the CRE asset class system used in the doctrine

rationale.description: Why this tier maps to that CRE class for this engagement

promoted_from.description: Prior class if this record was promoted (e.g., Jelly → Honey after repair)

repair_eligible.description: True if the record is a SwarmFixer pair candidate (typically all JELLY)

deed_eligible.description: True if the classification permits DDEED issuance (Honey + Royal Jelly only)
